# Bundled Real-ESRGAN Runtime

This directory contains the official universal macOS Real-ESRGAN portable
runtime and the `realesrgan-x4plus` photo model.

- Upstream project: https://github.com/xinntao/Real-ESRGAN
- Upstream release: https://github.com/xinntao/Real-ESRGAN/releases/tag/v0.2.5.0
- Architectures: arm64 and x86_64

The original release also contains demo media and anime models. Those files
are intentionally excluded because Clarity is an image-only photo upscaler.

See `licenses/` and the repository's `THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md` for licensing
information.
